Dark Mode

Lucas Simão

Full Stack Software Engineer
I'm a software engineer specialised in frontend and backend development for complex scalable web apps. I'm skilled at writing well-designed, testable and efficient code using the best practices in software engineering. I'm a fast learner, hard worker and team player who is proficient in an array of backend and frontend languages and tools. I write about software development on my blog.
View Portfolio Download Resume

What I do

I have more than 10 years' experience building software for clients. I started my carrer creating desktop applications and turned to the web platform as the demand for scalable, robust and distribuited solutions increased. All this years of work were accomplished honoring communication, honesty, engineering excelence and commitment as core values. Below is a quick overview of my main technical skill sets and technologies I use. Want to find out more about my experience? Check out my resume and project portfolio.

Vanilla JavaScript

I'm skilled in the most recent version of the language ES2019/ES10. Confortable both the OO and functional programming concepts in the language as well as the modern browsers Web APIs.

Angular & React

I've been involved in Angular 5 based projects and most recently I've been writing a lot of React v16+ based frontends using hooks, react-router, redux, Material-UI, styled-components and graphql. I test my react components using Jest and React Testing Library. For e2e tests, I'm using Cypress

Node.js

I have experience writing Node.js v10+ based restful backends using Express.js. Most recently, I started to write GraphQL based APIs once I realized how easy is to create, integrate and scale using this approach.

Java 8+

For the most part of my carrer, I wrote Java based web applications. I started writing JSF webapps and turned into Spring Boot to create restful backends. I'm also experienced with several de facto standard libraries like JUnit, Mockito, Hibernate/JPA, JAX-RS, CDI and EJB. I'm completelly confortable with new the stream, time, concurrency, I/O APIs as well as the new language constructs and improvements (module system, lambda expressions ...).

Ruby on Rails

I have a good understanding of Ruby (2.5+) syntax and nuances, solid understanding of object-oriented programming as well as experience with Ruby on Rails (5+) along with other common libraries and tools such as active record, rubocop, rspec, devise, pundit and sidekiq

Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis

I have been fortunated enough to collaborate in several projects that used different storage engines, ranging from traditional relational databases to NoSQL ones. I'm proficient in the SQL language as well as the extensions of each relational database.
